zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Wynslowe於1430年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾貝弗利時，她的父親Thomas Wynslowe15歲，母親Agnes Throckmorton14歲。她於1465年與John Alcock, Bishop of Rochester在英國英格蘭越可爾貝弗利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1501年在英國英格蘭享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Wynslowe于1430年出生在英国英格兰越可爾貝弗利时，她的父亲Thomas Wynslowe15岁，母亲Agnes Throckmorton14岁。她于1465年与John Alcock, Bishop of Rochester在英国英格兰越可爾貝弗利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1501年在英国英格兰享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Wynslowe was born in 1430, in Beverly, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Wynslowe, was 15 and her mother, Agnes Throckmorton, was 14. She married John Alcock, Bishop of Rochester in 1465, in Beverley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1501, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Wynslowe est née en 1430, à Beverly, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Wynslowe, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Agnes Throckmorton, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé John Alcock, Bishop of Rochester en 1465, à Beverley, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1501, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Wynslowe 1430 in Beverly, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Wynslowe 15 und ihre Mutter Agnes Throckmorton 14. Sie hat 1465 in Beverley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom John Alcock, Bishop of Rochester geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1501 im Alter von 71 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Wynslowe è nata il nel 1430 nel Beverly, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Wynslowe, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Agnes Throckmorton, aveva 14 anni. Lei sposato John Alcock, Bishop of Rochester nel 1465, nel Beverley, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1501, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Wynsloweが1430年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアベバーリーで生まれた時，父Thomas Wynsloweは15歳，母Agnes Throckmortonは14歳であった。1465年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアベバーリーでJohn Alcock, Bishop of Rochesterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1501年にイギリスイギリスで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Wynslowe(이)가 1430년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 비버리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Wynslowe(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Throckmorton(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 1465년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 베벌리에서 John Alcock, Bishop of Rochester(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1501년 영국 잉글랜드에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Wynslowe nasceu em 1430, em Beverly, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Wynslowe, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Throckmorton, tinha 14 anos. Ela casou-se com John Alcock, Bishop of Rochester em 1465, em Beverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1501, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Wynslowe родилась в 1430 г. в местности бивирли, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Wynslowe было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Throckmorton, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Alcock, Bishop of Rochester в 1465 г. в местности бивирли, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1501 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Wynslowe nació en 1430, en Beverly, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Wynslowe, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Agnes Throckmorton, tenía 14 años. Se casó con John Alcock, Bishop of Rochester en 1465, en Beverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1501, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 71 años.
